Keynote Speaker, Dave Delaney

Communication Workshops

Your Company Can’t Afford Poor Communication

Bring your team together to learn, laugh, and connect like never before, virtually or in person. Increase employee retention, strengthen company culture, and improve communication with Futureforth Nice Method workshops for your next off-site, company retreat, or executive leadership team event.

Inquire Today

The costs of recruiting and training new employees keep increasing; it slows your business down whenever you need to replace someone, and turnover contagion can quickly lead to a mass exodus. Stop throwing money and time at the problem, hoping no one will notice if you move fast enough.

On the flip side, if retention is going well, at what point do you think complacency could occur or a communication breakdown? Is it already?

Our elated clients come away with a clear understanding of their strengths, reimagined listening abilities, improved presentation performance skills, aligned company culture values, and a more humanistic brand.

Workshops to Improve Communication Skills

NEW in 2026: Grow Your Business with AI & Improve with Improv

Nice Method “Secret Weapon” Workshop

Audiences love Dave Delaney's Master Communicator's Secret Weapon keynote presentation. Why not add a workshop to your conference, convention, or company retreat? Get ready for a fun-filled, highly interactive workshop that will have your people thinking quickly on their feet while interacting, laughing, and learning along with their fellow participants. Earn trust, build relationships, become more creative, embrace spontaneity, use body language, lead with acceptance, actively listen, and improve your communication skills as you apply the 'secret weapon' in this engaging workshop.

Nice Method Storytelling & Presentation Planning

Delve into the history and power of storytelling and its vital role in human communication. Drawing inspiration from improv and standup comedy, learn techniques to think on your feet and conquer fear. Explore story arches as building blocks for captivating narratives.

Unlock audience engagement methods, both tried-and-true and innovative. Master the S.H.O.T. approach for effective presentation outlines. Loosen up with 4 & 8 breathing and limb exercises, boosting your presence and confidence.

Nice Method for Conflict Resolution & Mediation

This team-building and conflict-resolution workshop is designed to help participants develop essential communication and mediation skills for a harmonious workplace. Through interactive sessions, attendees will learn techniques like active listening and the "NICE Method" for addressing and resolving conflicts effectively. Mindfulness exercises and empathy practices will guide participants in maintaining calm and control during high-stress situations.

Leveraging AI for Small Business Growth: Content Creation & Strategy

Dave Delaney's workshop, Leveraging AI for Small Business Growth: Content Creation & Strategy, offers practical training for small business owners and marketing professionals. The session focuses on how Artificial Intelligence can revolutionize content creation and marketing strategies, enabling businesses to compete more effectively in today's digital landscape.

The workshop also includes real-world case studies showcasing small businesses that have achieved significant growth by integrating AI into their workflows, led by digital marketing veteran and communication expert Dave Delaney.

Contact Us Today to Learn More

Ask us about our train-the-trainer presentation skills workshops.

Featured

What clients say

“People love his workshop facilitation. He knows his stuff... If you have an opportunity to work together, it will be worth it.”
Anastasia Kudrez, Lead Educator for Grow with Google
“Dave is the Real Deal! His approach and knowledge made the time and investment pay off immediately. Yes, we give Dave as many "Thumbs Up" as we possibly can.”
Ginger Hardage, Former SVP of Culture & Communications at Southwest Airlines
“Dave’s style is confident, funny and direct...one of the best five hours I have spent professionally.”
Katie Owens, Vice President, HealthStream Engagement Institute
“My team truly enjoyed the event and have taken the tools provided to be able to improve both communication internally and externally. I would highly recommend Dave for any of your corporate communication needs.”
Carla Dodd, Silicon Ranch
“"... really relatable and down-to-earth. He is humble, while confident, and he has a lot of hands-on knowledge... He really knows what he's talking about."”
Barb Braud, Lamar Advertising
“Dave recently provided speaker training for our team… His training was not only informative, we had tons of fun and laughed a lot! We each learned valuable take-aways that we plan to apply to our future presentations.”
Melanie Jore, Vice President of Member Relations at NTCA
Check Availability
“Communication isn’t a soft skill. It’s a superpower.”

— Dave Delaney, powered by Futureforth.

  • Contact

Dave Delaney is an internationally recognized keynote speaker, leadership consultant, and communication strategist. As the founder of Futureforth, he works with organizations to improve employee retention, build inclusive workplace cultures, and enhance communication across hybrid, remote, and in-person teams. He speaks on topics such as neurodiversity in leadership, modern communication strategies, and connection-driven team building.

Futureforth
2517 Lebanon Road
Nashville, TN, USA
